# Time Series Analysis

**Summary**: A statistical method for forecasting future values based on historical data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] applied time-series analysis using ARIMA models to predict PM10 trends up to 2030.

## Key Results and Findings

- The ARIMA(0,1,0) model showed high convergence between actual and predicted results in the central region. ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 177]])
